--- a/explore_src.py
+++ b/explore_src.py
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+import sys

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+

+# Read system.py

+with open('/opt/triposr/tsr/system.py', 'r') as f:

+    system_src = f.read()

+print('=== system.py (first 2000 chars) ===')

+print(system_src[:2000])

+print('\n=== TSR.render method ===')

+import ast, inspect

+from tsr.system import TSR

+src = inspect.getsource(TSR.render)

+print(src)

+

+# Read nerf_renderer.py

+with open('/opt/triposr/tsr/models/nerf_renderer.py', 'r') as f:

+    renderer_src = f.read()

+print('\n=== nerf_renderer.py ===')

+print(renderer_src)
